coffeeList.name: Caffe Mocha
coffeeList.subtitle: Deep Foam
coffeeList.description: A cappuccino is an approximately 150 ml (5 oz) beverage, with 25 ml of espresso coffee and 85ml of fresh milk. The foam is created by introducing very small bubbles with a characteristic white colour, glossy surface and sweet taste.

coffeeList.name: Flat White
coffeeList.subtitle: Espresso
coffeeList.description: A flat white is a coffee drink consisting of espresso with microfoamed milk. It generally has a higher ratio of espresso to milk than a latte, and has a thinner layer of microfoam.

coffeeList.name: Cappuccino
coffeeList.subtitle: with Oat Milk
coffeeList.description: A cappuccino is an espresso-based coffee drink that originated in Italy, and is prepared with steamed milk foam. Variations of the drink involve the use of cream instead of milk.

coffeeList.name: Americano
coffeeList.subtitle: Black Coffee
coffeeList.description: Caffè Americano is a type of coffee drink prepared by diluting an espresso shot with hot water at a 1:3 to 1:4 ratio, resulting in a drink that retains the complex flavours of espresso.

coffeeList.name: Caffe Latte
coffeeList.subtitle: Milk Foam
coffeeList.description: A latte is a coffee drink made with espresso and steamed milk. The word comes from the Italian caffè e latte, meaning coffee and milk. It is a mild coffee drink with a creamy texture.

coffeeList.name: Macchiato
coffeeList.subtitle: Caramel
coffeeList.description: A macchiato is an espresso coffee drink with a small amount of milk, usually foamed. The name comes from the Italian word for stained or spotted, referring to the espresso stained with milk.
